title: castilleja pilosa subsp. jusselii
intro: Castilleja pilosa subsp. jusselii, also known as Jussel's Indian paintbrush, is a perennial herb belonging to the Orobanchaceae family and is native to North America. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its alkaloids and flavonoids. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an antiseptic. Castilleja pilosa subsp. jusselii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and its dried roots and flowers are used in herbal medicine.
